demo.banner: Demo mode — all data is reset periodically

login.title: Admin Login
login.findPassword: Find it in {file} next to the database file.

passwordForm.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.autoGeneratedNotice: Your password was auto-generated. Please set a new password to continue.

setup.passwordDesc: Choose a new password to secure the admin panel.
setup.storageDesc: Choose where to store uploaded photos. Local filesystem works out of the box; S3 is recommended for production.
setup.localStorageInfo: Photos will be stored on the server filesystem. No additional configuration needed.
setup.s3Compatible: Any S3-compatible storage works (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, MinIO, DigitalOcean Spaces, etc.).
setup.s3Requirements: You'll need a {bucket}, {region}, and an {keys} with read/write permissions.
setup.moderationDesc: Optional: automatically check guest uploads and messages for inappropriate content using OpenAI's moderation API.
setup.restartNotice: The server will restart automatically after setup to activate moderation.

settings.subtitle: Configure wedding details, venue, and bank accounts
settings.shortGreetingHint: Short tagline shown under the couple's names
settings.simpleRedirectUrlHint: Guests visiting /simple see a plain text-only invitation. Set a URL to redirect them to an external invitation card instead.
settings.embedHint: Embed an interactive map on the visitor page. Select a provider and configure its API key.
settings.linksHint: External map links shown as icons on the visitor page. Leave empty to hide.
settings.charterBusNoticeHint: Shown under the charter bus list. Leave empty to hide the notice.
settings.gameNpcMessageHint: Typing effect message shown to players who haven't beaten the game
settings.avatarColorsHint: Comma-separated hex colors for guestbook avatars
settings.hoursBeforeWeddingHint: How early before the wedding to enable uploads (0 = wedding time, 24 = 1 day before)
settings.flushIntervalHint: How often buffered hearts are written to DB (500-30000)
settings.flushBatchSizeHint: Flush immediately when buffer reaches this size (1-1000)

system.title: System Settings
system.subtitle: Configure storage, moderation, and server options
system.rateLimitingHint: Per-IP request rate limiting on all API endpoints
system.localStorageInfo: Photos are stored on the server filesystem. No additional configuration needed.
system.moderationRestartHint: Changes to moderation settings require a server restart to take effect.
system.thresholdsHint: Per-category score thresholds (0.0 - 1.0). Content is flagged if any category score meets or exceeds its threshold. Set to 1.0 to disable a category.
system.restartRequired: Moderation settings changed. A server restart is required for changes to take effect.
system.restartConfirmDesc: This will stop and restart the server. All active connections will be temporarily dropped.
system.s3Reinitialized: Photo storage has been re-initialized with the new configuration.

dashboard.subtitle: Overview of wedding site activity and statistics

photos.subtitle: Review and approve guest photo uploads
photos.name: Name
photos.resetHeartsDesc: Reset heart count for photo by {name} to 0?
photos.deleteDesc: Delete photo by {name}? This cannot be undone.
photos.bulkDeleteDesc: Delete {count} photos? This cannot be undone.

assetPhotos.title: Asset Photos
assetPhotos.subtitle: Upload wedding photos for game and main display
assetPhotos.bulkDeleteDesc: Delete {count} asset photos? This removes them from S3 and cannot be undone.
assetPhotos.label: Label
assetPhotos.deleteDesc: Delete '{name}'? This removes it from S3 and cannot be undone.

guestbook.subtitle: Manage guest messages and moderation
guestbook.deleteDesc: Delete message by {name}? This cannot be undone.
guestbook.bulkDeleteDesc: Delete {count} entries? This cannot be undone.

rankings.subtitle: View and manage game leaderboard scores
rankings.purgeDesc: This will delete ALL game scores, reset all visitors to first-time player state, and clear all earned achievements. Enter your admin password to confirm.
rankings.deleteDesc: Delete score for {name}? This cannot be undone.
rankings.bulkDeleteDesc: Delete {count} scores? This cannot be undone.

hallOfFame.subtitle: Users who completed all achievements
hallOfFame.empty: No hall of fame entries yet.
hallOfFame.deleteDesc: Delete hall of fame entry for {name}? This cannot be undone.
hallOfFame.bulkDeleteDesc: Delete {count} hall of fame entries? This cannot be undone.

errors.password_min_length: New password must be at least 8 characters
errors.setup_password_unchanged: Change the password before completing setup
errors.bcrypt_cost_range: bcrypt cost must be between 4 and 31
errors.game_timer_range: Game timer must be between 1000 and 120000 ms

tour.welcomeDescription: This panel is where you manage everything about your invitation. Here is a quick tour of the essentials.
tour.guestbookDescription: Read, hide, or delete guests' congratulatory messages — including the secret ones only you two can see.
tour.rankingsDescription: Manage the mini-game leaderboard — remove joke entries or reset it entirely.
tour.hallOfFameDescription: Guests who unlock every achievement are recorded here. You can remove entries.
tour.photosDescription: Approve or hide the photos guests upload on the wedding day.
tour.assetPhotosDescription: Upload the photos shown on the invitation and used by the matching game, and pick the main photo.
tour.settingsDescription: Fill in names, date, venue, bank accounts, and transport info here — everything your guests see on the invitation.
tour.systemDescription: Configure photo storage, automatic content moderation, and rate limiting.
tour.visitorsDescription: Shows how many guests are viewing the invitation right now.
tour.helpDescription: Click this question mark anytime to replay the tour.
